title: cleistocalyx nervosus var. paniala
intro: Cleistocalyx nervosus var. paniala, also known as the Filipino bay tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Cleistocalyx nervosus var. paniala include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. This plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Cleistocalyx nervosus var. paniala include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
